message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 20
skinparam BoxPadding 10

participant "AddressPanel : JPanel" as AP
participant "ContactsController" as CC
participant "addressFrame: JFrame" as AF
participant "Persistence" as P
participant "RepositoryFactory" as RF
participant "ContactsRepository" as CR
participant "BufferedReader" as BR
participant "FileReader" as FR

note over AP
double clicks on
the contact to open a window
end note

AP -> AF : new (contact)
AF --> CC : tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)
CC -> BR : create()
BR -> FR : create(file_name)

loop while there are lines to read
CC -> BR : readLine()
end

alt tmp == true
AF --> CC : updateAddress(contact, main_address, secundary_address)
CC -> P : getRepositoryFactory()
P -> RF : newInstance()
CC -> RF : getContactsRepository()
CC -> CR : update(contact)
end

@enduml
